description_long: This house features a modern architectural design with a mix of flat and gable roofs, large windows, and a combination of brick and light-colored exterior finishes. The property is surrounded by a low fence and includes a spacious driveway, a garage, and a front yard with a paved walkway. The backyard is equipped with a swimming pool, a wooden deck, and green lawn areas, providing ample outdoor living space. The structure appears to have two stories, with the upper level set back and featuring rooftop access or terraces. The window arrangement is asymmetrical, with large glass panels on the ground floor and smaller windows on the upper level. The main entryway is prominent, featuring a covered porch and a wide front door, complemented by landscaping elements such as trees and shrubs.
description: A modern two-story house with flat and gable roofs, large windows, a garage, and a backyard pool, surrounded by a low fence and landscaped yards.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, garage, driveway, and front yard with a paved walkway.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the backyard with a swimming pool, wooden deck, and green lawn, as well as the garage and driveway.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back facade, upper-level terraces, and the full extent of the fenced backyard.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the rear and side of the house, the pool, and the continuation of the driveway and yard.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Prominent covered porch with wide front door, steps, and minimalistic landscaping
